items.name: Open Terminal
items.description: Open Command Prompt in a target folder.

items.name: Run CMD
items.description: Execute a cmd.exe command and capture its output.

items.name: Open Browser
items.description: Open a URL in the default browser.

items.name: Download File
items.description: Download a file from the internet to a target path.

items.name: Git Clone
items.description: Clone a git repository into a target folder.

items.name: List Processes
items.description: Return the current Windows process list.

items.name: Search Files
items.description: Search for files by name under a root folder.

items.name: List Directory
items.description: List files and folders inside a target directory.

items.name: Read Text File
items.description: Read a text file with cmd type.

items.name: Open Folder
items.description: Open a folder in Windows Explorer.

items.name: Kill Process
items.description: Force-stop a running process by image name.

items.name: Git Pull
items.description: Run git pull --ff-only inside a repository.

items.name: Browser Search
items.description: Open a web search in the default browser.

items.name: Make Directory
items.description: Create a directory if it does not exist.

items.name: Extract Zip
items.description: Extract a zip archive into a destination folder.

items.name: Zip Folder
items.description: Create a zip archive from a folder.

items.name: Git Add And Commit
items.description: Stage all changes and create a git commit.

items.name: Git Push
items.description: Push the current branch to its remote.

items.name: NPM Run
items.description: Run an npm script inside a project.

items.name: Dotnet Build
items.description: Build a .NET project or solution.

items.name: Cargo Build
items.description: Build a Rust project with cargo.

items.name: Tasklist Filter
items.description: Filter running Windows processes by a name fragment.

items.name: Where EXE
items.description: Locate an executable available in PATH.

items.name: Copy File
items.description: Copy one file to another path.

items.name: Move File
items.description: Move or rename a file.

items.name: Find Text In Files
items.description: Search for text recursively inside files under a root directory.

items.name: Open Settings Page
items.description: Open a Windows settings page through the ms-settings protocol.
